description: A qualified lead has requested a live product demonstration.

nodes.task_description: Review the lead's details to understand their industry and needs to tailor the demo.

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares a demo script focused on the lead's specific use case.

nodes.task_description: Conduct a live, personalized demo of the product, focusing on the features most relevant to the lead.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully demonstrates the value of the product.

nodes.task_description: Follow up after the demo with a summary email and a quote.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a timely and professional follow-up.
